info.name: Dharwin Mobile App APIs (App scope)
info.description:
**App-scoped** subset of backend APIs for the Dharwin Expo app (`Dharwin App/my-app`).

Includes only what mobile screens and `services/mail.ts` need. **Full backend coverage** remains in `Dharwin-Mobile-App-APIs.postman_collection.json`.

**Setup:** Set `email` / `password` → run **1. Auth → Login** → other requests.

**Wiring:** Most UI still uses mocks (`mail-mock`, `meetings-mock`, etc.). `services/mail.ts` defines the mail contract; auth/chats/meetings/files services are planned.

**This collection:** 8 folders, 90 requests (vs full catalog).

See `postman/APP_API_SCOPE.md` for include/exclude rationale.

**API:** `POST /auth/login`

### Mobile app
login.tsx — Sign in (not wired yet; mock navigation today)

### How to connect in the app
- **Screen route:** `/login`
- **File:** `app/login.tsx`
- **Service:** services/auth.ts (planned)
- **When to call:** User taps **Sign in** after entering email + password
- **Navigation flow:** index (splash) → login → **Login** → store tokens → **Me** → router.replace("/(tabs)/…")
- **From → To:** app/index.tsx → app/(tabs)/*
- **Wiring status:** Not wired — mock navigates to /chats without API

### Backend (uat.dharwin.backend)
- **Route file:** `src/routes/v1/auth.route.js`
- **Handler:** `authController.login`
- **What it does:** Authenticates email/password, sets HttpOnly auth cookies, and may return access/refresh tokens in JSON when AUTH_RETURN_TOKENS_IN_JSON is enabled.
- **How to call:** POST body `{ email, password }`. Rate-limited. No Bearer token. Postman test script saves tokens to collection variables.
- **Auth / permissions:** Public

_App repo: `Dharwin App/my-app`. Auth service scaffold in `services/api.ts`; login screen not yet calling backend._

**API:** `GET /auth/me`

### Mobile app
Session bootstrap after login (planned; no caller yet)

### How to connect in the app
- **Screen route:** `/ (bootstrap) or tabs`
- **File:** `app/_layout.tsx / services/api.ts (planned)`
- **Service:** services/auth.ts → getMe()
- **When to call:** Immediately after Login; also on cold start if refresh token valid
- **Navigation flow:** Login success → **Me** → hydrate user, roles, feature flags → render tabs
- **From → To:** login.tsx or app bootstrap → All tabs (permission-gated UI)
- **Wiring status:** Not wired

### Backend (uat.dharwin.backend)
- **Route file:** `src/routes/v1/auth.route.js`
- **Handler:** `authController.getMe`
- **What it does:** Returns the authenticated user profile, sessions, feature flags, and optional impersonation context.
- **How to call:** GET with Bearer `accessToken`. Resigned candidate/employee accounts receive 403 (CANDIDATE_RESIGNED).
- **Auth / permissions:** Bearer JWT

_App repo: `Dharwin App/my-app`. Auth service scaffold in `services/api.ts`; login screen not yet calling backend._

**API:** `POST /auth/refresh-tokens`

### Mobile app
services/api.ts — silent token refresh (planned)

### How to connect in the app
- **Screen route:** `(global)`
- **File:** `services/api.ts`
- **Service:** services/api.ts — axios/fetch interceptor
- **When to call:** Any API returns 401; before retrying the failed request
- **Navigation flow:** API 401 → **Refresh Tokens** → update accessToken → retry original call
- **From → To:** Any authenticated screen → Same screen (transparent retry)
- **Wiring status:** Not wired

### Backend (uat.dharwin.backend)
- **Route file:** `src/routes/v1/auth.route.js`
- **Handler:** `authController.refreshTokens`
- **What it does:** Exchanges a valid refresh token for new access/refresh tokens and refreshes auth cookies.
- **How to call:** POST body `{ refreshToken }` or rely on refreshToken HttpOnly cookie.
- **Auth / permissions:** Valid refresh token (no access token required)

item.description:
## 1. Auth

JWT authentication for the mobile app. All other folders require a valid `accessToken` (Bearer) except public auth flows (login, register, forgot/reset password, verify email, refresh tokens).

**Mobile tab:** Sign in (pre-tabs)
**App routes:** `app/login.tsx`, `app/forgot-password.tsx`, `services/api.ts`, `services/auth.ts` (planned)

### App screens & inner routes

**Login & session (pre-tabs)**
- `app/index.tsx` → splash → `/login`
- `app/login.tsx` → **Login**, **Me**, **My Permissions**, **Page Capabilities**
- `app/forgot-password.tsx` → **Forgot Password**
- Deep links (planned) → **Reset Password**, **Verify Email**
- `services/api.ts` → **Refresh Tokens** on 401
- `app/mail/accounts.tsx` → **Logout**

**Service:** `services/auth.ts`, `services/api.ts` (planned)

### How to use in the mobile app
- **login.tsx** → **Login** → store tokens → **Me** + **My Permissions** + **Page Capabilities**.
- **forgot-password.tsx** → **Forgot Password**; email link → **Reset Password**.
- 401 on any API → **Refresh Tokens** → retry.
- **mail/accounts.tsx** sign-out → **Logout**.

### Postman testing
- Set collection variables `email` and `password`.
- Run **Login** — saves `accessToken` / `refreshToken`.
- Run **Me**, **My Permissions**, **Page Capabilities** with Bearer auth.
- Public flows (**Forgot Password**, **Reset Password**, **Verify Email**) use `noauth`.

### APIs in this folder

| Request | API | App screen | When to call | Backend handler | What it does |
|---------|-----|------------|--------------|-----------------|--------------|
| Login | `POST /auth/login` | /login (app/login.tsx) | User taps **Sign in** | `authController.login` | Authenticates email/password; sets cookies; may return tokens in JSON. |
| Register | `POST /auth/register` | (none) | Self-registration (web-first) | `authController.register` | Creates a new user account. |
| Register Student | `POST /auth/register-student` | (none) | Student signup | `authController.registerStudent` | Creates student user account. |
| Register Mentor | `POST /auth/register-mentor` | (none) | Mentor signup | `authController.registerMentor` | Creates mentor user account. |
| Register Recruiter | `POST /auth/register-recruiter` | (web admin) | Admin creates recruiter | `authController.registerRecruiter` | Admin-only recruiter registration. |
| Me (current user) | `GET /auth/me` | app bootstrap / tabs | After login; cold start refresh | `authController.getMe` | Returns user profile, sessions, flags, impersonation context. |
| Update Me | `PATCH /auth/me` | (none) | User saves profile | `authController.updateMe` | Updates authenticated user profile fields. |
| Me with Candidate | `GET /auth/me/with-candidate` | (web candidate portal) | Candidate profile load | `authController.getMeWithCandidate` | Returns user plus linked candidate record. |
| Update Me with Candidate | `PATCH /auth/me/with-candidate` | (web candidate portal) | Candidate saves profile | `authController.updateMeWithCandidate` | Updates user and candidate profile fields. |
| Extract Skills from Resume | `POST /auth/me/extract-skills-from-resume` | (web ATS) | Resume upload | `authController.extractSkillsFromResume` | Extracts skills from uploaded resume file. |
| Recommend Skills by Role | `POST /auth/me/recommend-skills-by-role` | (web profile) | Role-based skill suggestions | `authController.recommendSkillsByRole` | Returns skill recommendations for a job role. |
| Skill Recommendations | `GET /auth/me/skill-recommendations` | (web profile) | Load saved recommendations | `authController.listSkillRecommendations` | Lists stored skill recommendation history. |
| My Permissions | `GET /auth/my-permissions` | app bootstrap | After login for RBAC gating | `authController.getMyPermissions` | Returns effective permission keys. |
| Page Capabilities | `GET /auth/page-capabilities` | app bootstrap | After login for page CRUD map | `authController.getMyPageCapabilities` | Returns structured page/feature capabilities. |
| Refresh Tokens | `POST /auth/refresh-tokens` | services/api.ts interceptor | API returns 401 | `authController.refreshTokens` | Exchanges refresh token for new access/refresh tokens. |
| Logout | `POST /auth/logout` | /mail/accounts (app/mail/accounts.tsx) | User taps **Sign out** | `authController.logout` | Revokes refresh token and clears auth cookies. |
| Forgot Password | `POST /auth/forgot-password` | /forgot-password (app/forgot-password.tsx) | User submits email on forgot screen | `authController.forgotPassword` | Sends password reset email if account exists. |
| Reset Password | `POST /auth/reset-password?token=` | deep link (planned) | User completes reset form from email link | `authController.resetPassword` | Sets new password using one-time token. |
| Change Password | `POST /auth/change-password` | (none) | Authenticated password change | `authController.changePassword` | Changes password after verifying current password. |
| Verify Email | `POST /auth/verify-email?token=` | deep link (planned) | User opens verification email link | `authController.verifyEmail` | Marks email as verified. |
| Send My Verification Email | `POST /auth/me/send-verification-email` | (none) | Resend verification from profile | `authController.sendMyVerificationEmail` | Sends verification link to current user. |
| Send Verification Email (admin) | `POST /auth/send-verification-email` | (web admin) | Admin resends user verification | `authController.sendVerificationEmail` | Admin sends verification email to a user. |
| Impersonate | `POST /auth/impersonate` | (web admin) | Admin impersonates user | `authController.impersonate` | Starts impersonation session. |
| Stop Impersonation | `POST /auth/stop-impersonation` | (web admin) | End impersonation | `authController.stopImpersonation` | Restores original admin session. |
| Send Candidate Invitation | `POST /auth/send-candidate-invitation` | (web ATS) | Invite candidate to portal | `authController.sendCandidateInvitation` | Sends candidate portal invitation email. |

### Backend route files
- `src/routes/v1/auth.route.js`

request.description:
**API:** `GET /email/accounts`

### Mobile app
mail/accounts.tsx, mail/add-account.tsx, (tabs)/mails.tsx account switcher

### How to connect in the app
- **Screen route:** `/(tabs)/mails | /mail/accounts`
- **File:** `app/(tabs)/mails.tsx, app/mail/accounts.tsx`
- **Service:** services/mail.ts → listAccounts("gmail")
- **When to call:** Mails tab mount; accounts screen open; after OAuth connect
- **Navigation flow:** Tab load → **GET Accounts** → populate switcher → save accountId
- **From → To:** Tab bar Mails → mail/[folder], thread, compose
- **Wiring status:** Service ready; screens use mock

### Backend (uat.dharwin.backend)
- **Route file:** `src/routes/v1/email.route.js`
- **Handler:** `emailController.listGmailAccounts`
- **What it does:** Lists Gmail accounts linked to the authenticated user.
- **How to call:** GET, no params. Saves first account id to `accountId` via Postman test script.
- **Auth / permissions:** Bearer JWT + emails.read

_App repo: `Dharwin App/my-app`. Mail client in `services/mail.ts`; most mail screens still use mock data until wired._

**API:** `GET /email/auth/google`

### Mobile app
mail/add-account.tsx — Connect Gmail

### How to connect in the app
- **Screen route:** `/mail/add-account`
- **File:** `app/mail/add-account.tsx`
- **Service:** services/mail.ts → getOAuthUrl("gmail")
- **When to call:** User taps **Connect Gmail**
- **Navigation flow:** add-account → **OAuth Start** → open browser URL → user consents
- **From → To:** mail/accounts or sidebar → OAuth callback deep link
- **Wiring status:** Service ready; deep link handler not built

### Backend (uat.dharwin.backend)
- **Route file:** `src/routes/v1/email.route.js`
- **Handler:** `emailController.getGoogleAuthUrl`
- **What it does:** Returns a Google OAuth authorization URL to connect a Gmail mailbox.
- **How to call:** GET with Bearer. Open returned `{ url }` in browser; completes via callback route.
- **Auth / permissions:** Bearer JWT + emails.manage

_App repo: `Dharwin App/my-app`. Mail client in `services/mail.ts`; most mail screens still use mock data until wired._

**API:** `DELETE /email/accounts/{{accountId}}`

### Mobile app

- **When to call:** User revokes/disconnects a Gmail account
- **Navigation flow:** add-account → confirm → **DELETE Account** → refresh list
- **From → To:** mail/accounts, add-account → Same screen (updated list)

### Backend (uat.dharwin.backend)
- **Route file:** `src/routes/v1/email.route.js`
- **Handler:** `emailController.disconnectGmailAccount`
- **What it does:** Disconnects/revokes a linked Gmail account for the current user.
- **How to call:** DELETE `/email/accounts/:accountId` — Mongo ObjectId path param.
- **Auth / permissions:** Bearer JWT + emails.manage

_App repo: `Dharwin App/my-app`. Mail client in `services/mail.ts`; most mail screens still use mock data until wired._

item.description:
## 2. Mail - Gmail

Gmail integration via connected accounts. Provider prefix: `/email/*`. Mail API client lives in `services/mail.ts`.

**Mobile tab:** Mails
**App routes:** `app/(tabs)/mails.tsx`, `app/mail/*` (thread, compose, accounts, settings, create-label)

### App screens & inner routes

**Tab:** `app/(tabs)/mails.tsx` → account switcher, recent threads

**Inner screens**
| Route | File | APIs to wire |
|-------|------|--------------|
| `/mail/[folder]` | `app/mail/[folder].tsx` | List Threads/Messages, Labels |
| `/mail/thread/[id]` | `app/mail/thread/[id].tsx` | Thread Detail, Patch, Trash, Delete, Attachment |
| `/mail/compose` | `app/mail/compose.tsx` | Send, Reply, Forward, AI Draft, Templates |
| `/mail/accounts` | `app/mail/accounts.tsx` | GET Accounts |
| `/mail/add-account` | `app/mail/add-account.tsx` | Connection Policy, OAuth, DELETE Account |
| `/mail/settings` | `app/mail/settings.tsx` | Signature Get/Patch |
| `/mail/create-label` | `app/mail/create-label.tsx` | Create Label |

**Service:** `services/mail.ts` (provider `gmail` → `/email/*`)

### How to use in the mobile app
- **GET Accounts** + **Connection Policy** on mail setup.
- **OAuth - Start Google** → callback → **GET Accounts** again.
- Inbox: **List Threads** (or **List Messages**) + **Labels**.
- Thread actions: **Patch Message**, **Trash Thread**, **Delete Message**, **Get Attachment**.
- Compose: **Send**, **Reply**, **Forward**, **Drafts - AI Generate**, templates/signature.

### Postman testing
- Run **GET Accounts** after login — saves `accountId`.
- Use `accountId` on all mail queries/bodies.
- OAuth Start opens browser; Callback is server redirect (not mobile Bearer call).

### APIs in this folder

| Request | API | App screen | When to call | Backend handler | What it does |
|---------|-----|------------|--------------|-----------------|--------------|
| GET Accounts | `GET /email/accounts` | /(tabs)/mails \| /mail/accounts | Mails tab mount; after OAuth | `emailController.listGmailAccounts` | Lists Gmail accounts linked to the user. |
| Connection Policy | `GET /email/connection-policy` | /mail/add-account | Before showing connect buttons | `emailController.getConnectionPolicy` | Returns mail account connection limits/policy. |
| OAuth - Start Google | `GET /email/auth/google` | /mail/add-account | User taps **Connect Gmail** | `emailController.getGoogleAuthUrl` | Returns Google OAuth authorization URL. |
| OAuth - Google Callback | `GET /email/auth/google/callback` | deep link (planned) | After Google redirect | `emailController.googleCallback` | Handles OAuth callback; stores tokens. |
| DELETE Account | `DELETE /email/accounts/{{accountId}}` | /mail/add-account | User disconnects Gmail | `emailController.disconnectGmailAccount` | Disconnects linked Gmail account. |
| List Threads | `GET /email/threads` | /(tabs)/mails \| /mail/[folder] | Folder mount; refresh; search | `emailController.listThreads` | Lists Gmail threads with pagination. |
| List Messages | `GET /email/messages` | /(tabs)/mails \| /mail/[folder] | Flat message list mode | `emailController.listMessages` | Lists Gmail messages with pagination. |
| Thread Detail | `GET /email/threads/{{threadId}}` | /mail/thread/[id] | User opens thread | `emailController.getThread` | Fetches thread with messages. |
| Single Message | `GET /email/messages/{{messageId}}` | /mail/thread/[id] | Expand message body | `emailController.getMessage` | Fetches one Gmail message. |
| Send Message | `POST /email/messages/send` | /mail/compose | User taps **Send** | `emailController.sendMessage` | Sends new email via Gmail. |
| Reply | `POST /email/messages/{{messageId}}/reply` | /mail/compose?mode=reply | Send on reply | `emailController.replyMessage` | Replies to a message. |
| Reply All | `POST /email/messages/{{messageId}}/reply-all` | /mail/compose?mode=replyAll | Send on reply-all | `emailController.replyAllMessage` | Reply-all to a message. |
| Forward | `POST /email/messages/{{messageId}}/forward` | /mail/compose?mode=forward | Send on forward | `emailController.forwardMessage` | Forwards a message. |
| Patch Message (labels/read) | `PATCH /email/messages/{{messageId}}` | /mail/thread/[id] | Star, read/unread, archive | `emailController.modifyMessage` | Adds/removes labels on a message. |
| Batch Modify Messages | `POST /email/messages/batch-modify` | (none) | Bulk label on messages | `emailController.batchModifyMessages` | Batch label changes on messages. |
| Batch Modify Threads | `POST /email/threads/batch-modify` | (none) | Bulk label on threads | `emailController.batchModifyThreads` | Batch label changes on threads. |
| Trash Thread | `POST /email/threads/trash` | /mail/thread/[id] | User deletes thread | `emailController.trashThreads` | Moves threads to Gmail trash. |
| Delete Message | `DELETE /email/messages/{{messageId}}` | /mail/thread/[id] | Permanent delete message | `emailController.deleteMessage` | Permanently deletes a Gmail message. |
| Get Attachment | `GET /email/messages/{{messageId}}/attachments/{{attachmentId}}` | /mail/thread/[id] | User taps attachment | `emailController.getAttachment` | Downloads attachment binary. |
| Labels | `GET /email/labels` | /mail/[folder] + sidebar | Mails tab load; sidebar | `emailController.listLabels` | Lists Gmail labels/folders. |
| Create Label | `POST /email/labels` | /mail/create-label | User creates custom label | `emailController.createLabel` | Creates a new Gmail label. |
| Templates - List | `GET /email/templates` | /mail/compose | Template picker (planned) | `emailPreferencesController.listTemplates` | Lists personal compose templates. |
| Templates - Create | `POST /email/templates` | /mail/compose | Save as template (planned) | `emailPreferencesController.createTemplate` | Creates personal template. |
| Templates - Patch | `PATCH /email/templates/{{templateId}}` | /mail/compose | Edit template (planned) | `emailPreferencesController.updateTemplate` | Updates personal template. |
| Signature - Get | `GET /email/signature` | /mail/settings | Settings mount | `emailPreferencesController.getSignature` | Returns user email signature. |
| Signature - Patch | `PATCH /email/signature` | /mail/settings | User saves signature | `emailPreferencesController.patchSignature` | Updates user signature. |
| Drafts - AI Generate | `POST /email/drafts/generate` | /mail/compose | AI assist button | `emailController.generateDraft` | Generates AI draft options via OpenAI. |
| Admin Templates - List | `GET /email/admin/templates` | (web admin) | Org template admin | `emailPreferencesController.adminListTemplates` | Lists org admin templates. |
| Admin Templates - Create | `POST /email/admin/templates` | (web admin) | Create org template | `emailPreferencesController.adminCreateTemplate` | Creates org-wide email template. |
| Admin Templates - Patch | `PATCH /email/admin/templates/{{templateId}}` | (web admin) | Edit org template | `emailPreferencesController.adminUpdateTemplate` | Updates org admin template. |
| Admin Templates - Delete | `DELETE /email/admin/templates/{{templateId}}` | (web admin) | Delete org template | `emailPreferencesController.adminDeleteTemplate` | Deletes org admin template. |
| Admin Signature - Get | `GET /email/admin/signature` | (web admin) | Load org signature | `emailPreferencesController.adminGetSignature` | Returns org default email signature. |
| Admin Signature - Patch | `PATCH /email/admin/signature` | (web admin) | Org signature admin | `emailPreferencesController.adminPatchSignature` | Updates org default signature. |
| Templates - Delete | `DELETE /email/templates/{{templateId}}` | /mail/compose | Delete personal template | `emailPreferencesController.deleteTemplate` | Deletes personal compose template. |

### Backend route files
- `src/routes/v1/email.route.js`

item.description:
## 3. Mail - Outlook

Microsoft Outlook / Office 365 mail. Provider prefix: `/outlook/*`. Same UI as Gmail; pass `provider=outlook` in `services/mail.ts`. Templates/signature use shared `/email/templates` and `/email/signature` (folder 2).

**Mobile tab:** Mails
**App routes:** Same as Gmail — `app/mail/*` with Outlook account selected

### App screens & inner routes

Same screens as folder 2 — pass `provider: "outlook"` in `services/mail.ts` (`/outlook/*`).

| Route | File | APIs to wire |
|-------|------|--------------|
| `/mail/[folder]` | `app/mail/[folder].tsx` | List Threads, Labels |
| `/mail/thread/[id]` | `app/mail/thread/[id].tsx` | Thread Detail, Patch, Trash, Delete, Attachment |
| `/mail/compose` | `app/mail/compose.tsx` | Send, Reply, Reply All, Forward |
| `/mail/add-account` | `app/mail/add-account.tsx` | OAuth Start/Callback, DELETE Account |
| `/mail/create-label` | `app/mail/create-label.tsx` | Create Label |

**Service:** `services/mail.ts` (provider `outlook` → `/outlook/*`); templates/signature via `/email/*`

### How to use in the mobile app
- **GET Accounts** saves `outlookAccountId`.
- **OAuth - Start Microsoft** → callback → list accounts again.
- Mirror Gmail flows using `/outlook/*` paths and `outlookAccountId`.
- Personal templates/signature: use folder 2 **Templates** / **Signature** endpoints.

### Postman testing
- Run **GET Accounts** — saves `outlookAccountId`.
- Use `outlookAccountId` on all Outlook queries/bodies.
- If testing Gmail only, skip this folder.

### APIs in this folder

| Request | API | App screen | When to call | Backend handler | What it does |
|---------|-----|------------|--------------|-----------------|--------------|
| GET Accounts | `GET /outlook/accounts` | /(tabs)/mails \| /mail/accounts | Mails tab mount; after OAuth | `outlookController.listOutlookAccounts` | Lists Outlook accounts linked to the user. |
| OAuth - Start Microsoft | `GET /outlook/auth/microsoft` | /mail/add-account | User taps **Connect Outlook** | `outlookController.getMicrosoftAuthUrl` | Returns Microsoft OAuth URL. |
| OAuth - Microsoft Callback | `GET /outlook/auth/microsoft/callback` | deep link (planned) | After Microsoft redirect | `outlookController.microsoftCallback` | Handles OAuth callback; stores tokens. |
| DELETE Account | `DELETE /outlook/accounts/{{outlookAccountId}}` | /mail/add-account | User disconnects Outlook | `outlookController.disconnectOutlookAccount` | Disconnects linked Outlook account. |
| List Threads | `GET /outlook/threads` | /(tabs)/mails \| /mail/[folder] | Folder mount; refresh; search | `outlookController.listThreads` | Lists Outlook mail threads. |
| List Messages | `GET /outlook/messages` | /(tabs)/mails \| /mail/[folder] | Flat message list mode | `outlookController.listMessages` | Lists Outlook messages with pagination. |
| Thread Detail | `GET /outlook/threads/{{threadId}}` | /mail/thread/[id] | User opens thread | `outlookController.getThread` | Fetches Outlook thread/conversation. |
| Single Message | `GET /outlook/messages/{{messageId}}` | /mail/thread/[id] | Expand message body | `outlookController.getMessage` | Fetches one Outlook message. |
| Send Message | `POST /outlook/messages/send` | /mail/compose | User taps **Send** | `outlookController.sendMessage` | Sends new Outlook email. |
| Reply | `POST /outlook/messages/{{messageId}}/reply` | /mail/compose?mode=reply | Send on reply | `outlookController.replyMessage` | Replies to Outlook message. |
| Reply All | `POST /outlook/messages/{{messageId}}/reply-all` | /mail/compose?mode=replyAll | Send on reply-all | `outlookController.replyAllMessage` | Reply-all on Outlook message. |
| Forward | `POST /outlook/messages/{{messageId}}/forward` | /mail/compose?mode=forward | Send on forward | `outlookController.forwardMessage` | Forwards Outlook message. |
| Patch Message (labels/read) | `PATCH /outlook/messages/{{messageId}}` | /mail/thread/[id] | Read/unread; move folder | `outlookController.modifyMessage` | Updates Outlook message folders/flags. |
| Batch Modify Messages | `POST /outlook/messages/batch-modify` | (none) | Bulk update messages | `outlookController.batchModifyMessages` | Batch folder changes on messages. |
| Batch Modify Threads | `POST /outlook/threads/batch-modify` | (none) | Bulk update threads | `outlookController.batchModifyThreads` | Batch folder changes on conversations. |
| Trash Thread | `POST /outlook/threads/trash` | /mail/thread/[id] | User deletes thread | `outlookController.trashThreads` | Moves conversations to Deleted Items. |
| Delete Message | `DELETE /outlook/messages/{{messageId}}` | /mail/thread/[id] | Permanent delete message | `outlookController.deleteMessage` | Permanently deletes Outlook message. |
| Get Attachment | `GET /outlook/messages/{{messageId}}/attachments/{{attachmentId}}` | /mail/thread/[id] | User taps attachment | `outlookController.getAttachment` | Downloads attachment binary. |
| Labels | `GET /outlook/labels` | /mail/[folder] + sidebar | Mails tab load; sidebar | `outlookController.listLabels` | Lists Outlook mail folders. |
| Create Label | `POST /outlook/labels` | /mail/create-label | User creates folder | `outlookController.createLabel` | Creates Outlook mail folder/label. |

### Backend route files
- `src/routes/v1/outlook.route.js`
- `src/routes/v1/email.route.js (templates/signature shared)`

## 4. Internal Meetings

Schedule and manage Dharwin-native internal meetings (LiveKit-backed). Base path: `/internal-meetings`. Distinct from external calendar sync.

**Mobile tab:** Meetings
**App routes:** `app/(tabs)/meetings.tsx`, `app/meeting/[id].tsx`, `app/meeting/create.tsx`

### App screens & inner routes

**Tab:** `app/(tabs)/meetings.tsx` → Upcoming / Completed / Cancelled segments

**Inner screens**
| Route | File | APIs to wire |
|-------|------|--------------|
| `/meeting/[id]` | `app/meeting/[id].tsx` | Detail, Recordings, Cancel, Resend Invites, LiveKit token (folder 5) |
| `/meeting/create` | `app/meeting/create.tsx` | Create, Patch / Reschedule |

**Service:** `services/meetings.ts` (planned)

### How to use in the mobile app
- Meetings tab → three list variants (**List - Upcoming/Completed/Cancelled**) — same endpoint, different `status` query.
- Tap row → **Detail**; sets `meetingRoomName` for LiveKit (folder 5).
- FAB → **Create**; edit flow → **Patch / Reschedule**; cancel → **Cancel (PATCH status)**.
- Recording section → **Recordings for Meeting**; global library in folder 6.

### Postman testing
- Run **List - Upcoming** — test script should capture `meetingId`.
- Run **Detail** before Patch/Cancel; saves `meetingRoomName` for LiveKit folder.
- **Delete** is admin-only permanent removal — no mobile UI yet.

### APIs in this folder

| Request | API | App screen | When to call | Backend handler | What it does |
|---------|-----|------------|--------------|-----------------|--------------|
| List - Upcoming | `GET /internal-meetings?status=scheduled` | /(tabs)/meetings | Upcoming segment mount/refresh | `internalMeetingController.list` | Paginated meetings with status=scheduled (upcoming). |
| List - Completed | `GET /internal-meetings?status=ended` | /(tabs)/meetings | Completed segment selected | `internalMeetingController.list` | Same list endpoint filtered to ended meetings. |
| List - Cancelled | `GET /internal-meetings?status=cancelled` | /(tabs)/meetings | Cancelled segment selected | `internalMeetingController.list` | Same list endpoint filtered to cancelled meetings. |
| Detail | `GET /internal-meetings/{{meetingId}}` | /meeting/[id] | User opens meeting from list | `internalMeetingController.get` | Returns meeting by id including LiveKit room name. |
| Create | `POST /internal-meetings` | /meeting/create | User submits schedule form | `internalMeetingController.create` | Creates meeting, assigns LiveKit room, sends invites. |
| Patch / Reschedule | `PATCH /internal-meetings/{{meetingId}}` | /meeting/create | Edit existing meeting | `internalMeetingController.update` | Updates title, schedule, hosts, status, etc. |
| Cancel (PATCH status) | `PATCH /internal-meetings/{{meetingId}}` | /meeting/[id] \| /(tabs)/meetings | User confirms cancel | `internalMeetingController.update` | Sets status to cancelled. |
| Delete | `DELETE /internal-meetings/{{meetingId}}` | (none) | Permanent delete (admin) | `internalMeetingController.remove` | Deletes meeting and tears down LiveKit room. |
| Resend Invites | `POST /internal-meetings/{{meetingId}}/resend-invitations` | /meeting/[id] | Resend invites button (planned) | `internalMeetingController.resendInvitations` | Re-sends invitation emails/notifications. |
| Recordings for Meeting | `GET /internal-meetings/{{meetingId}}/recordings` | /meeting/[id] | Recording section on detail | `internalMeetingController.getRecordings` | Lists recordings linked to this meeting. |

### Backend route files
- `src/routes/v1/internalMeeting.route.js`

item.description:
## 5. LiveKit

Real-time audio/video via LiveKit. Tokens are short-lived — fetch immediately before joining. Used by **Meetings** (scheduled rooms) and **Chats** (P2P call rooms).

**Mobile tab:** Meetings + Chats (in-call)
**App routes:** `app/meeting/[id].tsx`, `app/chat/[id].tsx`, `app/call/new.tsx`

### App screens & inner routes

Not a separate tab — invoked when user joins a room.

| Trigger screen | When | LiveKit APIs |
|----------------|------|--------------|
| `app/meeting/[id].tsx` | **Join Meeting** | Token - Meeting, Recording Start/Stop/Status, Waiting room |
| `app/chat/[id].tsx`, `app/call/new.tsx` | Start call | Token - Chat Call (after folder 8 **Start Call**) |

**Service:** `services/livekit.ts` (planned)

### How to use in the mobile app
- Meeting join → **Token - Meeting** with `meetingRoomName` from folder 4 **Detail**.
- Chat call → folder 8 **Start Call** → **Token - Chat Call** with `forChatCall: true`.
- Host recording → **Recording - Start/Stop/Status** during active room.
- Waiting room enabled → **Waiting Participants** poll → **Admit Participant** / **Remove Participant**.

### Postman testing
- Set `meetingRoomName` from folder 4 **Detail** test script.
- Token response is client-only — do not log in production.
- Recording endpoints require `meetings.record` permission.

### APIs in this folder

| Request | API | App screen | When to call | Backend handler | What it does |
|---------|-----|------------|--------------|-----------------|--------------|
| Token - Meeting | `POST /livekit/token` | /meeting/[id] | User taps Join Meeting | `livekitController.getToken` | Mints LiveKit JWT for meeting room (host/guest permissions). |
| Token - Chat Call | `POST /livekit/token` | /chat/[id] \| /call/new | Join in-app audio/video call | `livekitController.getToken` | Same endpoint; verifies chat membership when `forChatCall: true`. |
| Recording - Start | `POST /livekit/recording/start` | In-call UI (planned) | Host starts recording | `livekitController.startRecording` | Starts LiveKit egress recording for room. |
| Recording - Stop | `POST /livekit/recording/stop` | In-call UI (planned) | Host stops recording | `livekitController.stopRecording` | Stops active egress; requires `egressId` from start response. |
| Recording - Status | `GET /livekit/recording/status/{{meetingRoomName}}` | In-call UI (planned) | Poll REC indicator | `livekitController.getRecordingStatus` | Returns recording/egress status for room. |
| Waiting Participants | `GET /livekit/waiting-participants/{{meetingRoomName}}` | In-call lobby (planned) | Host views waiting room queue | `livekitController.getWaitingParticipants` | Lists participants awaiting admission. |
| Admit Participant | `POST /livekit/admit-participant` | In-call lobby (planned) | Host admits guest | `livekitController.admitParticipant` | Admits waiting participant into room. |
| Remove Participant | `POST /livekit/remove-participant` | In-call lobby (planned) | Host denies/removes guest | `livekitController.removeParticipant` | Removes or denies participant from waiting/active room. |

### Backend route files
- `src/routes/v1/livekit.route.js`

item.description:
## 8. Chats

In-app messaging between Dharwin users. **REST** for history, groups, and calls; **realtime** via Socket.IO.

**Mobile tab:** Chats (+ Calls history subset in folder 9)
**App routes:** `app/(tabs)/chats.tsx`, `app/chat/[id].tsx`, `app/chat/new.tsx`

### App screens & inner routes

**Tab:** `app/(tabs)/chats.tsx` → conversation inbox

**Inner screens**
| Route | File | APIs to wire |
|-------|------|--------------|
| `/chat/[id]` | `app/chat/[id].tsx` | Detail, Messages, Send, Upload, Delete, React, Mark Read, group admin, Start Call |
| `/chat/new` | `app/chat/new.tsx` | User Search, Create Direct/Group Conversation |

**Service:** `services/chat.ts`, `shared/contexts/ChatSocketContext.tsx` (Socket.IO client)

### Realtime architecture (Socket.IO)

| Layer | Location | Notes |
|-------|----------|-------|
| Backend server | `src/index.js` → `initSocket(httpServer)` | Path `/socket.io`, JWT in `auth.token` |
| Socket service | `src/services/chatSocket.service.js` | Events: `message`, `message_deleted`, `message_reacted`, `conversation_updated`, `incoming_call`, `call_ended`, etc. |
| Frontend client | `shared/contexts/ChatSocketContext.tsx` | Connect after login; uses **Socket Token** (`GET /chats/socket-token`) |

REST writes (send message, create group) persist to MongoDB **and** emit socket events to online participants.

### How to use in the mobile app
- Chats tab → **List Conversations**.
- New chat → **User Search** → **Create Direct/Group Conversation**.
- Group admin → **Update Group Name**, **Upload Group Avatar**, **Add/Remove Participants**, **Set Participant Role**.
- Open chat → **Messages** + socket `message` events; send → **Send Message** or **Send Message with File**.
- Call button → **Start Call** → folder 5 **Token - Chat Call** → **Update Call** / **End Call by Room**.
- Calls tab can also use **In-App Calls List**; unified log in folder 9.

### Postman testing
- Run **Login** first.
- **User Search** → sets `chatParticipantUserId`.
- **Create Group Conversation** or **List Conversations** → sets `conversationId`.
- **Messages** → sets `chatMessageId`; **Send Message** body uses `content` (not `text`).
- **Start Call** uses `callType` (not `type`) → sets `chatCallId` and `chatRoomName`.
- Socket events are not visible in Postman — test with app or socket client.

### APIs in this folder

| Request | API | App screen | When to call | Backend handler | What it does |
|---------|-----|------------|--------------|-----------------|--------------|
| List Conversations | `GET /chats/conversations` | /(tabs)/chats | Chats tab mount; refresh | `chatController.listConversations` | Paginated inbox for current user. |
| Create Direct Conversation | `POST /chats/conversations` | /chat/new | Select one user from search | `chatController.createConversation` | Creates/returns 1:1 conversation. |
| Create Group Conversation | `POST /chats/conversations` | /chat/new | Confirm group members + name | `chatController.createConversation` | Persists group; creator is admin. |
| Conversation Detail | `GET /chats/conversations/{{conversationId}}` | /chat/[id] | Header mount | `chatController.getConversation` | Metadata if user is participant. |
| Update Group Name | `PATCH /chats/conversations/{{conversationId}}` | /chat/[id] settings | Admin renames group | `chatController.updateGroupName` | Updates name; emits `conversation_updated`. |
| Upload Group Avatar | `POST /chats/conversations/{{conversationId}}/avatar` | /chat/[id] settings | Admin picks image | `chatController.uploadGroupAvatar` | Uploads avatar to S3; updates group. |
| Add Participants | `POST /chats/conversations/{{conversationId}}/participants` | /chat/[id] settings | Admin adds members | `chatController.addParticipants` | Adds users to group. |
| Remove Participant | `DELETE /chats/conversations/{{conversationId}}/participants/{{chatParticipantUserId}}` | /chat/[id] settings | Admin removes member / leave | `chatController.removeParticipant` | Removes participant from group. |
| Set Participant Role | `PATCH /chats/conversations/{{conversationId}}/participants/{{chatParticipantUserId}}/role` | /chat/[id] settings | Promote/demote admin | `chatController.setParticipantRole` | Sets role admin or member. |
| Delete Conversation | `DELETE /chats/conversations/{{conversationId}}` | /chat/[id] | Delete chat for user | `chatController.deleteConversation` | Deletes conversation; emits `conversation_deleted`. |
| Messages | `GET /chats/conversations/{{conversationId}}/messages` | /chat/[id] | Mount + scroll-up pagination | `chatController.getMessages` | Paginated message history. |
| Send Message | `POST /chats/conversations/{{conversationId}}/messages` | /chat/[id] | Send text from composer | `chatController.sendMessage` | Persists message; emits realtime event. |
| Send Message with File | `POST /chats/conversations/{{conversationId}}/messages/upload` | /chat/[id] | Attach file/image | `chatController.uploadAndSendMessage` | Uploads to S3 and sends as message. |
| Delete Message | `DELETE /chats/conversations/{{conversationId}}/messages/{{chatMessageId}}` | /chat/[id] | Delete for me/everyone | `chatController.deleteMessage` | Soft-delete; emits `message_deleted`. |
| React to Message | `POST /chats/conversations/{{conversationId}}/messages/{{chatMessageId}}/react` | /chat/[id] | Tap reaction | `chatController.reactToMessage` | Toggle emoji; emits `message_reacted`. |
| Mark Read | `PATCH /chats/conversations/{{conversationId}}/read` | /chat/[id] \| /(tabs)/chats | Open thread / view messages | `chatController.markAsRead` | Clears unread for current user. |
| Start Call | `POST /chats/conversations/{{conversationId}}/call` | /chat/[id] | Phone/video button | `chatController.initiateCall` | Creates call record; emits `incoming_call`. |
| Conversation Calls List | `GET /chats/conversations/{{conversationId}}/calls` | /chat/[id] history | Open call history in chat | `chatController.listCallsForConversation` | Calls scoped to one conversation. |
| Active Call for Conversation | `GET /chats/conversations/{{conversationId}}/active-call` | /chat/[id] | Join ongoing call banner | `chatController.getActiveCallForConversation` | Returns active call if any. |
| Update Call | `PATCH /chats/calls/{{chatCallId}}` | in-call UI | End/miss/decline/join | `chatController.updateCall` | Updates call status and duration. |
| Start Call Recording | `POST /chats/calls/{{chatCallId}}/recording/start` | in-call UI | Record button | `chatController.startChatCallRecording` | Starts LiveKit egress for chat call. |
| End Call by Room | `POST /chats/calls/end-by-room` | in-call UI | Disconnect from LiveKit | `chatController.endCallByRoom` | Ends call by room name; emits `call_ended`. |
| Socket Token | `GET /chats/socket-token` | app bootstrap | Before Socket.IO connect | `chatController.getSocketToken` | Returns JWT for socket auth handshake. |
| User Search | `GET /chats/users/search` | /chat/new \| /call/new | Type in search field | `chatController.searchUsers` | Search users by name/email. |
| In-App Calls List | `GET /chats/calls` | /(tabs)/calls (optional) | In-app call history tab | `chatController.listCalls` | Paginated in-app calls for user. |

### Backend route files
- `src/routes/v1/chat.route.js`
- `src/services/chatSocket.service.js` (realtime)

item.description:
## 9. Unified Calls

Single call log merging **telephony** (Bolna voice) and **in-app** (chat LiveKit) calls. One backend endpoint with `source` filter. Distinct from folder 8 **In-App Calls List** (chat-scoped only).

**Mobile tab:** Calls
**App routes:** `app/(tabs)/calls.tsx`, `app/call/new.tsx`

### App screens & inner routes

**Tab:** `app/(tabs)/calls.tsx` → unified history with filters (All / In-App / Telephony)

**Inner:** `app/call/new.tsx` → **User Search** (folder 8) + **Token - Chat Call** (folder 5)

**Service:** `services/communication.ts` (planned)

### How to use in the mobile app
- Calls tab mount → **All Calls** (`source=all` or omit).
- Filter chips → **In-App Calls Only** or **Telephony Calls Only**.
- Optional: folder 8 **In-App Calls List** when viewing history inside a specific chat.
- Tap row → navigate using metadata to `chat/[id]` or external dialer info.

### Postman testing
- Compare **All Calls** vs **In-App Calls Only** vs folder 8 **In-App Calls List**.
- Optional query filters: `search`, `status`, `purpose`, `language`.

### APIs in this folder

| Request | API | App screen | When to call | Backend handler | What it does |
|---------|-----|------------|--------------|-----------------|--------------|
| All Calls | `GET /communication/calls?source=all` | /(tabs)/calls | Calls tab mount; default view | `communicationController.listUnifiedCalls` | Unified log: telephony + in-app with all filters. |
| In-App Calls Only | `GET /communication/calls?source=in_app` | /(tabs)/calls | In-App filter selected | `communicationController.listUnifiedCalls` | Chat LiveKit calls only. |
| Telephony Calls Only | `GET /communication/calls?source=telephony` | /(tabs)/calls | Telephony filter selected | `communicationController.listUnifiedCalls` | Bolna/external telephony calls only. |

### Backend route files
- `src/routes/v1/communication.route.js`
